comment: The curated shelf a FRESH brain arrives with. Pre-installed on first run only (install-if-absent); NEVER clobbers a populated installed.json — see seed_default_apps() in api/apps.py and project_rsync_installed_json_hazard. Single source of truth — edit this list to change the default shelf. Each app installs through the normal GitHub-URL brain-app path (clone -> validate manifest -> register). `id` is the manifest id (used for the install-if-absent precheck); the authoritative id/route/version come from each repo's brain-app.yaml at install time. Domain apps (poker/quantum/health/arztbrief) stay OFF this consumer shelf.
